titleStmt.title: SII 8.368: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 368. (A.R. No. 88 of 1903). ON THE SAME ROCK.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābhara
ṇaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvara vijeyarājyaprava¨rddhamāna mācaṁdrā¨rkkatāraṁbaraṁ kalyāṇada nelebīḍinalu sukhasaṁkathāvinō
dadiṁ rājyaṁ sulattamire tatpādapadmōpajīvigaḷu sahavāsi vijṛṁbhibhaṭṭanāyakana jyēṣṭabha
ṭṭanāyaka bimmināyakanuṁ śrīmadguttiyakōṭeya rājādya
kṣadapāḷeyadintiralū ranumatyadiṁ svasti samadhigatapaṁcemahāśabda mahāmaṁḍa
ḷēsvaraṁ vīramahēśvaraṁ cōḷakaṭakakarituragapaṭusubhaṭanicayani¨rjjitabaḷavadaribaḷatimirakhaṁ
ḍana pratāpamā¨rttaṁḍaṁ nikarakoḷgaṁḍaṁ draviḷamaṁḍaḷikaśiraḥkhaṁḍanaṁ maṁḍaḷika mukhamaṁḍanaṁ na
daṭa maṁḍaḷikatārakāsurāri dasakaṇṭhamurāri mitramaṁḍaḷikakuḷā¨rnnavacaṁdraṁ bhōgāmarēṁ
dra satyavikhyātaṁ maṁḍaḷikamāndātraṁ mahāsēneyaṁkakāṟaṁ pallikōṭa gharaṭṭa ghū¨rjjara
diśāpaṭṭaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvara kaṭṭedalagumalavaranallaguṇaṁ nāmādi samasta praśastisa
hitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ mallarasaru tuṁbuḷanelevīḍinallu sindavāḍi 1000
muvanāḷuttaṁ sukhadimire tatpādapadmōpajīvi śrīmadguttiya daṁḍanāyakaṁ mā¨rttaṁḍa
rasaru lōkadoṇeyalu pratiṣṭhemāḍida bīmēśvaradēva¨rgge khaṁḍasphuṭita jī¨rṇnōddhāriṇe
nivēdyāṣṭa¨rcana pūjepunaskārakkemāgi śrīmanmahā maṁḍaḷēśva
ra mā¨rttaṁḍarasaru śrīmaccāḷukyavikramakālada 33 neya sa¨rvvadhārisaṁvatsarada jē
ṣṭadamāvāsye bṛhaspativāradaṁdu sū¨ryyagrahaṇa nimityadiṁ yamani
yamādiguṇasamādhisaṁpannarappa kāḷāmukhatapōdhanarappa sū¨ryyābharaṇapaṁḍita
¨rgge dhārāpū¨rvvakaṁ māḍi kōṭeya nairityadiśāvaradalu biṭṭa kariyakeyi mattaru 30 kolu
puriya suyyatigaṟde mattaru 25 Intī dha¨rmmamaṁ sa¨rvvābhyaṁtarasiddhiyāgi biṭaru
© mattamā sū¨ryyagrahaṇa nimittyadiṁ nelegōṭeya sabhāmaṁṭapada vināyakadēvarasnānadhūpadī
panivēdyaṣṭā¨rccana pūjāpunaskārakkavāgi bhāskarabhaṭṭariṁge yā sa¨rvvābhyaṁtarasiddhiyāge biṭṭa
kariyakeyi mattaru 12 nelegōṭeyallu gāṇa 1 . bahubhi¨rvvasudhā dattā rājabhissagarādi
bhiḥ [.] yasya yasya yadā bhūmistasyatasya tadā phalaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 8.368 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
